creator: richard@tector.org.uk
text:
The handbook lists the UK rsync mirror as:
    rsync://rsync.mirror.ac.uk/

    Available collections:
        * ftp.FreeBSD.org: A full mirror of the FreeBSD FTP server.

mirror.ac.uk is now mirrorservice.org, and as such the correct URL for the FreeBSD mirror is now:
    rsync://rsync.mirrorservice.org/sites/ftp.freebsd.org/
